heading: Certiorari—(Rule)
label: 3736 Certiorari—(Rule)
notes: See Federal Rules of Criminal ProcedurePetition to Supreme Court, time, Rule 37(b).

References in TextRule 37 of the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure was abrogated , eff. . Provisions of such former rule for certiorari are covered by rule 19 et seq. of the Rules of the United States Supreme Court.Dec. 4, 1967July 1, 1968
